results.title: Valid login succeeds
results.expected: User should be authenticated and shown as logged in.

results.title: Post-login redirect
results.expected: User should be redirected away from login page after successful login.

results.title: Logout invalidates session
results.observed: After logout URL: https://automationexercise.com/, logged-in indicator visible after back: false
results.expected: After logout, authenticated pages should not be accessible via browser back navigation.

results.title: Invalid password rejection
results.observed: Error message shown for invalid password.
results.expected: System should reject invalid password with clear error.

results.title: Empty credential validation
results.observed: Required flags - email: true, password: true
results.expected: Email and password fields should enforce non-empty validation.

results.title: Unregistered email rejection
results.expected: System should reject unregistered email login attempt.

results.title: Repeated failed attempts keep UI stable
results.observed: Failed attempt errors visible: 5/5, UI still interactive: true
results.expected: Repeated failed attempts should show stable failure feedback without UI hang/crash.
